commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And you shall not escape out of his hand, but shall surely be taken, and delivered into his hand; and your eyes shall behold the eyes of the king of Babylon, and he shall speak with you mouth to mouth, and you shall go to Babylon. Go to, yet shall not see Babylon, (Ezechiel xii. ) his eyes being put out, chap. (Calmet) See 4 Kings xxv. (Worthington) Paine objects this as a false prophecy, though it was verified so terribly. Daniel, would not neglect to bury the king.
